extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the Champs-Élysées sprint after GROENEWEGEN Dylan launched too early with 700m remaining.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange led out GROENEWEGEN who started sprint too early; PHILIPSEN timed final 700m perfectly from Norwegian Corner.
Multiple breakaway attempts inside 30km all neutralized; sprint teams prevented POGAČAR's entertainment attack on final lap.

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: BikeExchange leadout was strong but he misjudged sprint timing, going from too far out
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: chose not to contest sprint, prioritizing team celebration over personal result despite green jersey win
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: attacked on final lap despite third place GC secured, showing race aggression even ceremonially
